/usr/bin/cc -g "CMakeFiles/ace-gui.dir/src/shell/main.c.o" "CMakeFiles/ace-gui.dir/src/shell/ace-app.c.o" "CMakeFiles/ace-gui.dir/src/shell/ace-window.c.o" "CMakeFiles/ace-gui.dir/src/shell/ace-topbar.c.o" "CMakeFiles/ace-gui.dir/src/shell/ace-dock.c.o" "CMakeFiles/ace-gui.dir/src/shell/ace-activities.c.o" "CMakeFiles/ace-gui.dir/src/shell/ace-desktop.c.o" "CMakeFiles/ace-gui.dir/src/shell/ace-theme.c.o" "CMakeFiles/ace-gui.dir/src/wm/ace-wm.c.o" "CMakeFiles/ace-gui.dir/src/wm/ace-window-manager.c.o" "CMakeFiles/ace-gui.dir/src/apps/ace-app-launcher.c.o" "CMakeFiles/ace-gui.dir/src/apps/ace-files.c.o" "CMakeFiles/ace-gui.dir/src/apps/ace-settings.c.o" "CMakeFiles/ace-gui.dir/src/apps/ace-terminal.c.o" "CMakeFiles/ace-gui.dir/src/apps/ace-calculator.c.o" "CMakeFiles/ace-gui.dir/src/apps/ace-clock.c.o" "CMakeFiles/ace-gui.dir/src/apps/ace-notes.c.o" "CMakeFiles/ace-gui.dir/src/utils/ace-utils.c.o" -o ace-gui  -lgtk-4 -lpangocairo-1.0 -lpango-1.0 -lharfbuzz -lgdk_pixbuf-2.0 -lcairo-gobject -lcairo -lvulkan -lgraphene-1.0 -lgio-2.0 -lgobject-2.0 -lglib-2.0 -lglib-2.0 -lgio-2.0 -lgobject-2.0 -lglib-2.0 -lcairo -lm -lvulkan -lgraphene-1.0 -lm
